candidates.why: Direct total revenue line and a valid top-line measure; identical to Net Sales in preview.
Not revenue; this is a cost line and should not be used for REVT.
Direct sales/revenue line at the top of the income statement; appropriate top-line measure.

variables.notes: Using Net Sales as primary top-line, with Total Revenue as fallback because both appear to represent the same revenue concept across years.

candidates.why: Generic COGS label, but preview is empty and the statement appears to use a different direct-cost presentation.
Generic COGS label, but preview is empty and likely a template/helper row rather than the main reported cost line.
This is the populated direct operating cost line immediately after gross profit and best matches cost of sales/production costs.

variables.notes: Selected the populated direct-cost line rather than empty generic COGS placeholders.

candidates.why: Personnel-related overhead component; appropriate SG&A component.
Broad overhead bucket, but duplicated label exists on the sheet so it is somewhat ambiguous.
Selling/marketing overhead component; appropriate SG&A component.
Stock-based compensation is commonly included in SG&A overhead.
Explicit SG&A row exists, but appears empty in the preview; per rules include it plus other overhead buckets for coverage.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists but appears mostly empty, so included it plus clearly identifiable overhead components. Avoided duplicated 'Other Operating Expenses' label because the sheet contains that exact label more than once, creating ambiguity.
No dedicated research and development line is visible on the income statement.

candidates.why: Interest expense, but lease-specific and narrower than a broader finance cost line.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense and other finance costs
candidates.why: Broad interest/finance expense label; useful fallback, though one preview year looks inconsistent.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense and Other Finance Costs
candidates.why: Best broad interest expense / finance cost line with populated values across years.
Too broad and not specifically interest expense; weaker fallback.
Too generic and appears empty in preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Lease-specific and supplemental; lower priority than main reported finance expense lines.
Balance-sheet candidate is not appropriate for income-statement interest expense mapping.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense and Other Finance Costs
Interest expense and other finance costs

variables.notes: Ordered as priority list: broad main finance expense first, alternate casing/version second, lease-specific interest as fallback.

candidates.why: Best equity line because it appears to exclude non-controlling interests; total equity equals Equity plus NCI in the preview.
Includes non-controlling interests based on reconciliation to Equity plus NCI, so not preferred when MIB is mapped separately.
Balancing row, not a reported equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total assets/liabilities+equity line, not book equity.

variables.notes: Selected Equity because it excludes non-controlling interests, avoiding double count with MIB.

candidates.why: Income-statement attribution line, not preferred when a balance-sheet NCI line exists.
Income-statement attribution line, not preferred when a balance-sheet NCI line exists.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income for the year attributable to Non-controlling interests
candidates.why: OCI attribution line, not balance-sheet minority interest.
Direct balance-sheet NCI line; best match for minority interest.
Equivalent balance-sheet minority interest label; valid fallback.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet NCI labels as priority list; these should pair with BE='Equity' without double counting.
